title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Very strong to SEVERE Thunderstorms are expected for the Benelux region on June 27th 2026, with the highest risk being a SEVR

SEVR
Belgium, Netherlands & NE Germany
Severe thunderstorms acompanied by severe wind gusts (some models showing up to 130km/h in south Belgium), large destructive hail, Heavy rain (local floodings) and a strong lightning activity. We also cannot rule out the possibility of isolated tornadoes towards late night in the Netherlands and Germany.

MDRT
Belgium, Luxembourg, Netherlands & NE Germany
Similar hazards as in SEVR, but smaller possibility and intensity.

ENHD
Belgium, Luxembourg, Netherlands & E Germany
Strong thunderstorms from the Netherlands are expected to come late in the night, acompanied with strong wind gusts and hail.

CIN also plays a huge role, making this a "loaded gun" scenario, but the gun might actually go off.

This might be the most significant day for the region of the year
